\[
0.5gt^2 = 68.88

\[
0.5g = \frac{68.88}{23.2324} \approx 2.965
\]

Thus

\[
g \approx 5.93
\]

\[
1.59^2 = 2.5281

\[

\]

So again

\[
g \approx 5.93
\]

\[
4.85^2 = 23.5225
\]

Then

\[
0.5g = \frac{69.74}{23.5225} \approx 2.965
\]

Again consistent with

\[
g \approx 5.93
\]

So the hidden gravitational constant is approximately

\[
g = 5.93
\]
